name: siggraph-skills
description: Depth pack for the ACM SIGGRAPH Technical Papers program: the ACM TOG journal-integrated dual-track model, Linklings single-round review with rebuttal and Technical Papers Committee meeting, conditional acceptance, the acmart/acmtog format, the supplemental-video and replicability culture, and the Graphics Replicability Stamp.

plugins.name: siggraph-skills
plugins.description: Twelve SIGGRAPH-specific skills for the ACM SIGGRAPH / SIGGRAPH Asia Technical Papers program and its ACM Transactions on Graphics (TOG) journal-integrated publication model, grounded in the SIGGRAPH 2026 and SIGGRAPH Asia 2026 technical-papers calls, ACM Digital Library TOG, and dblp.
